name: Biskotine
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together thoroughly.
2. Add the eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Incorporate the flavorings.
4. Sift and add the dry ingredients to the mixture.
5. Place the dough in the freezer for a while.
6. Shape the dough into small loaves, about 1 inch around, and place them on a cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 375°F for about 25 to 30 minutes.
8. Remove from the oven and cut the loaves into the desired thickness.
9. Lay (slices) flat on the cookie sheet and lower the temperature to 200°F for 15 to 20 minutes.
NOTE: I use 2 cups cake flour and 2 cups regular flour
Source: Madeline Yeseta Gavran "Our Favorite Recipes"
St. Anthony Croatian Catholic Church
Typed by Karen Mintzias
